title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at PropEquity

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at PropEquity
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
